Recent News

  • Sep. 2025 Our paper on Training-Free MoA for MDS was submitted to Neural Computing and Applications.
  • Aug. 2025 Started as Research Assistant at Business AI Lab, NEU.
  • Jun. 2024 Our work on BERT-based Vietnamese Bank Document Classification accepted at CITA 2024.
  • Mar. 2024 Published ML-based Intrusion Detection research in Neural Computing and Applications.

I am a Research Assistant at AIoT Lab (Phenikaa University), where I am supervised by Dr. Trang Mai Xuan. I also work closely with Dr. Thien Van Luong at National Economics University. My research primarily focuses on AI for Healthcare.

I am actively seeking PhD positions in Computer Science, with a focus on Multi-Agent Systems, LLMs, and AI for Healthcare. If you have opportunities or would like to collaborate, please feel free to reach out!

Machine Learning & Deep Learning

Developing predictive models and representation learning methods for complex data.

Multi-Agent Systems

Building agentic frameworks with LLMs for knowledge-intensive reasoning tasks.

AI for Healthcare

Applying ML/AI to healthcare applications for clinical decision support.

Generative AI

Exploring LLM efficiency, reliability, and privacy-aware deployment.
